sceneLabel: 203 Sc37 — Botanist composes hints email (To: Tyson Bernard + NPS HQ)
composeBody:
You will look where water cuts stone, that is where things surface.
You will mark the map in blue and call it progress.
But gardens do not follow rivers.
I work where roots drink slowly, where footsteps disappear, where it is buried is safest from the sun.
You can restore balance or wait for a Spider Lily to bloom.

* Botanist.
